title: Piramal Pharma is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Piramal Pharma is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Consultant Physician looking for your next big career move? Piramal Pharma in Kanpur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Piramal Pharma:
Piramal Pharma is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in ICD-10

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Piramal Pharma!
